candidates.why: Separate operating D&A summary line appears at the same level as other operating expense buckets, but nothing indicates any portion is specifically tied to the selected COGS bucket ('Subcontractors' + 'Cost of materials'). Using it for COGS would risk misallocating overhead D&A to COGS.
Component of the separate D&A section, not explicitly labelled as COGS-related and subordinate to the D&A summary. Not suitable for separate COGS add-back absent clear COGS linkage.
Granular component under the separate D&A section, with no indication it belongs to the selected COGS rows. Also inferior to the summary row if any D&A were to be chosen.

variables.notes: Selected COGS rows are direct cost components only. The excerpt shows no explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row (e.g., 'depreciation in cost of sales'). The visible D&A lines are separate operating items but not attributable to COGS, so the conservative no-double-count choice is to add nothing for COGS_DA.

candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A summary row above EBIT, presented alongside the selected overhead buckets rather than nested within them. The selected XSGA bucket ('Personnel expenses' + 'Operating expenses') excluded D&A in the prior mapping notes, so this separate summary row should be added later. Prefer the summary over components to avoid double counting.
Component beneath the D&A summary row. Do not choose when the summary row is available, to avoid double counting.
Component beneath the D&A summary row. Inferior to the summary row for separate addition.

variables.notes: Manually Added. The D&A summary is a distinct operating line before EBIT and appears outside/alongside the selected XSGA component rows, not as a subcomponent of them. There is no separate R&D row selected in XRD, so no special R&D exclusion applies. Use only the summary row, not its component rows.
